evals.prompt: /code-review Review my local changes before I commit. Focus on correctness and security.
evals.expected_output: Inspects local diff, reads changed files, lists findings first by severity with file references, and includes validation results.
assertions: Findings appear before summaries and are ordered by severity.
Each finding includes a file/line reference when available, impact, and suggested fix.
Review covers correctness, security, type safety, tests, performance, and maintainability as relevant to the diff.
Does not post to GitHub unless the prompt explicitly asks for posting.
Includes validation commands run or explicitly says why validation was skipped.

Includes validation commands run or explicitly says why validation was skipped.

evals.prompt: Review PR #42 and tell me whether to approve or request changes. Don't post to GitHub yet.
evals.expected_output: Uses PR mode, fetches metadata/diff if gh is available, reviews full context, reports decision locally, and does not publish.
assertions: Findings appear before summaries and are ordered by severity.
Each finding includes a file/line reference when available, impact, and suggested fix.
Review covers correctness, security, type safety, tests, performance, and maintainability as relevant to the diff.
Does not post to GitHub unless the prompt explicitly asks for posting.
Includes validation commands run or explicitly says why validation was skipped.

Review covers correctness, security, type safety, tests, performance, and maintainability as relevant to the diff.
Does not post to GitHub unless the prompt explicitly asks for posting.
Includes validation commands run or explicitly says why validation was skipped.

evals.prompt: This is a docs-only diff. Run a lighter review but still catch broken examples or misleading instructions.
evals.expected_output: Adjusts review scope for docs/config, focuses on correctness and examples, and avoids irrelevant production-code checks.
assertions: Findings appear before summaries and are ordered by severity.
Each finding includes a file/line reference when available, impact, and suggested fix.
Review covers correctness, security, type safety, tests, performance, and maintainability as relevant to the diff.
Does not post to GitHub unless the prompt explicitly asks for posting.
Includes validation commands run or explicitly says why validation was skipped.

Includes validation commands run or explicitly says why validation was skipped.

evals.expected_output: Uses PR review mode, finds the PR by branch name with gh when available, reviews locally, and does not publish.
